data.title: Bridgestone introduces RACING BATTLAX V03 Slick Motorcycle Tire, offering best grip in BATTLAX history. Launching Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: Bridgestone Corporation is set to release a new track-only premium motorcycle tire in a press release on October 23, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee. This tire promises to deliver the best grip in the history of Bridgestone's BATTLAX series, boasting technologies honed over years of elite motorcycle racing. This new tire aims to provide riders with improved performance and safety on the track.

data.title: Ellington Financial's estimated book value per share of common stock is $13.40 as of September 30, 2025. Dividend of $0.13 per share.
data.description: In Old Greenwich, Conn., Ellington Financial Inc. (NYSE: EFC) disclosed a calculated book value per share of common stock at approximately $13.40 as of September 30, 2025. This figure accounts for the new monthly dividend of $0.13 per share of common stock, scheduled for disbursement on October 31, 2025, to stockholders recorded as of September 30, 2025. The ex-dividend date remains the same. The company advises caution when considering forward-looking statements pertaining to estimated book value per common stock.

data.title: Kraken's revenue soars 114% in Q3 to $648M with expanding operations and IPO plans, driven by trading and user growth.
data.description: In the latest quarter, the exchange recorded $648 million in revenue, driven by increased trading volumes, user expansion, and successful acquisitions.

data.title: US plans quantum computing investments to match China, boosting national security. Washington eyes direct investments in US companies.
data.description: The US government is contemplating making direct investments in American quantum computing companies in an effort to stay competitive with China's technological advancements. This initiative comes as Washington aims to bolster its capabilities in this rapidly evolving sector, where China has been making significant strides. The proposed investments signal a strategic move to support and bolster the US quantum computing industry against growing international competition.

data.title: Click Bond, Inc. celebrates Manufacturing Day on Oct. 29, 2025 at Watertown plant, offering plant tours and interviews.
data.description: A plant in Watertown is offering a unique opportunity for students and families to explore career options in advanced manufacturing. Click Bond, Inc. in Watertown, Conn., will be hosting an event on Oct. 23, 2025, featuring plant tours, interviews, and various family activities and food. The company aims to showcase career opportunities in the field and is inviting media representatives to attend. This event is a chance for individuals to learn more about the industry and potential pathways.

data.title: London Blockchain Conference 2025 highlights blockchain, AI impact on digital trust and governance. Day 2 concludes with industry leaders and policymakers.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, in London, the second day of the London Blockchain Conference concluded at Evolution London. The conference gathered prominent figures from the industry, policymakers, and innovators to explore the impacts of blockchain, AI, and Web3 technologies in providing practical solutions. The event aimed at fostering digital trust and enhancing technological advancements.

data.title: Mueller Water Products raises quarterly dividend by 4.5% to $0.070 per share from $0.067, payable on Nov 20, 2025.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Mueller Water Products, Inc. (NYSE: MWA) revealed a rise in its quarterly dividend by around 4.5%, from $0.067 to $0.070 per share. The payment is set to be made around November 20, 2025, to shareholders on record as of November 10, 2025.

data.title: Burnham Holdings, Inc. reports Q3 2025 financial results, driven by portfolio adjustments for strong growth. OTCPink: BURCA.
data.description: Strategic changes in Burnham Holdings, Inc. (OTC-Pink: BURCA) have led to significant growth and a more targeted approach for long-term value generation. The company, based in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, shared its financial outcomes for the third quarter of the year. These adjustments have boosted performance and sharpened focus on core objectives, positioning the company for enhanced value creation in the future.

data.title: Ecopetrol gets approval for COP 700,000 million loan from local financial institutions. Ministry of Finance authorized the loan.
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia on October 23, 2025, Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) released news that the Ministry of Finance and Public Credit ("MHCP") authorized their Resolution 2691 on October 21, 2025. This approval is significant for Ecopetrol as it allows them to proceed with planned financial activities. This development is crucial for the company's operations, signaling potential growth and stability in their market activities.
Company announces upcoming cash dividend payment to shareholders.

data.title: Community Healthcare Trust Inc. raised Q3 dividend to $0.475 per share on common stock. Board of Directors announces the increase.
data.description: In Franklin, Tennessee on October 23, 2025, Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated (NYSE: CHCT) released news of a boosted common stock cash dividend for the quarter ending on September 30, 2025. The dividend has been hiked to $0.475 per share by the Board of Directors.

data.title: OKX to offer BLUAI perpetual futures trading with up to 50x leverage, starting Oct 23, 2025. 24/7 trading available.
data.description: Starting on October 23, 2025, OKX will list USDT-margined perpetual futures for BLUAI. This new listing will offer 24/7 trading availability and provide traders with up to 50x leverage for their transactions.

data.title: Elevate Holistics reports positive 2025 medical cannabis research supporting therapeutic benefits - CEO Aspen Noonan leads expansion.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, on October 23, 2025, Elevate Holistics, a top telehealth platform aiming to increase access to medically-prescribed cannabis, has shared significant results from research conducted in 2025. The findings emphasize the healing benefits of medical cannabis and are consistent with previous studies.

data.title: Nelnet Campus Commerce makes major product updates post 2025 Virtual Client Summit, advancing Project Horizon.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska on October 23, 2025, Nelnet Campus Commerce, a renowned provider of payment technology for higher education, revealed significant product enhancements and roadmap progress after hosting the 2025 Virtual Client Summit. These developments underscore the ongoing success of Project Horizon, with a focus on innovation and growth in the higher education payment sector.

data.title: Meridian Corp Q3 2025 results released, declares $0.125/share dividend for the quarter.
data.description: In recent data, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 7.8%, marking a significant rise from the previous month's rate of 6.2%. This represents a total of 1.5 million individuals who are currently unemployed. Additionally, the number of new jobless claims has also seen a surge, with a 42% increase compared to the same period last year. These statistics highlight the growing economic challenges faced by many individuals and the potential impact on the overall workforce.

data.title: Casino watchdog, G. Michael Brown (82), passed away. He later ran the nation's most profitable casino in Connecticut.
data.description: After overseeing the introduction of casinos in New Jersey, he later managed the most lucrative casino in Connecticut.

data.title: FHLB Dallas, along with 4 banks, awards $45K grant to Fuller Center for Housing NWLA Inc as part of $1.2M PGP funds.
data.description: A group of financial institutions including Cadence Bank, Origin Bank, Progressive Bank, and Red River Bank, along with the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas), will be presenting $45,000 in grants to the Fuller Center for Housing NWLA Inc. during a check ceremony at 11:00 a.m. on Thursday, October 30 in Bossier City, Louisiana. This funding is part of a larger $1.2 million allocation from the Partnership Grant Program (PGP) administered by FHLB Dallas. The Fuller Center is the recipient of the grants and plays a pivotal role in providing housing support in the region.

data.title: Carlyle Credit Income Fund prices offering of 1.2 million shares of 7.375% Series D Preferred Shares at $25/share, raising $29.4M.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Carlyle Credit Income Fund (NYSE: CCIF) disclosed the pricing of an underwritten public offering of 1.2 million shares of its 7.375% Series D Preferred Shares due 2028 at $25 per share. This move will generate around $29.4 million in net proceeds for the Fund post payment of underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses. Egan-Jones Ratings Company has assigned a ‘BBB+’ rating to the Preferred Shares, certifying their quality.

data.title: Guardian Capital Group's shareholders approve Desjardins acquiring shares for C$68 each.
data.description: Guardian Capital Group Limited, a Toronto-based company listed on the TSX as GCG and GCG.A, revealed that their shareholders have given the green light for a significant acquisition deal. This approval came during a special meeting where an arrangement resolution was passed, allowing Desjardins Global Asset Management Inc., an affiliate of Desjardins Group, to acquire all outstanding common and Class A shares of Guardian. The deal, which will be executed under the Business Corporations Act (Ontario), will see the Purchaser pay C$68.00 in cash for each share, excluding those held by specific shareholders who have agreed to equity rollover agreements.

data.title: Light & Wonder delisting from Nasdaq, transitioning to ASX. Stock delisted, ASX sole listing.
data.description: Light & Wonder, Inc. (LNW) announced its plan to delist its common stock from the Nasdaq and switch to a sole primary listing on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX). The move was officially communicated to The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. Light & Wonder, trading under ticker symbols NASDAQ: LNW and ASX: LNW, made this decision to consolidate its primary listing exclusively on the ASX. This shift aligns with previous statements from the company.
